blockedAssertions.blockedBy: LiveView on_mount callback crashes with ArgumentError: flash not fetched when redirecting unauthenticated users
Admin dashboard LiveView crashes with ArgumentError: flash not fetched - same root cause as VAL-AUTH-003
Cannot verify non-admin denial - admin dashboard crashes for all users including valid admins
Protected routes (/dashboard, /admin) crash instead of redirecting guests to sign-in

rootCauseAnalysis.issue: LiveView on_mount callbacks call Phoenix.LiveView.put_flash before Phoenix.LiveView.redirect
rootCauseAnalysis.description: The on_mount callbacks in PredictionsWeb.Plugs.Auth (:ensure_authenticated and :ensure_admin) call Phoenix.LiveView.put_flash before redirecting unauthenticated/non-admin users. This fails with ArgumentError: flash not fetched, call fetch_flash/2 because flash hasn't been initialized in the LiveView lifecycle during mount.
rootCauseAnalysis.suggestedFix: Either: 1) Use Phoenix.Controller.redirect in the router pipeline before LiveView mounts, or 2) Avoid put_flash in on_mount for redirect cases and rely on the destination page to show the flash message, or 3) Ensure flash is fetched before the on_mount runs.

whatWorks: Login creates valid session with user_token cookie
Invalid credentials are rejected with error message
whatNeedsFix: LiveView on_mount callbacks crash when redirecting unauthenticated/non-admin users
Protected LiveView routes (/dashboard, /admin) crash for all users due to flash bug
